MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2022 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON FEB-22-2022 AT 10:05 AM IN DEPT. 306, JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO. HENRY YANDELL, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. RICHARD LEE, SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PERSON. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT RICHARD LEE FOR MAR-18-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A DECLARATION, OR IF SANCTIONS PAID BY 03/17/22 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. MR. YANDELL WAS ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 306 BY 10:30AM TODAY VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT TRIAL CALL AND THE DEPARTMENT'S PHONE NUMBER WAS ALSO PROVIDED, AND MR. LEE TO PROCEED FORTHWITH TO DEPT. 306. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
